$description: C2 DOMAIN tokens — tactical meaning specific to the C2 Hub product (threat lifecycle accents). These are NOT part of the reusable core; another product would replace this file wholesale. Domain tokens may reference core primitives but core must never reference these.

threat.$description: Spine/accent colors for a target's threat lifecycle. Each maps to a stage in the detect -> track -> mitigate -> resolve flow. Used as the card spine and status accent.
